mapper.select: SELECT c.*, u.username AS headmaster_name FROM sys_class c LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON c.headmaster_id = u.id
SELECT c.*, u.username AS headmaster_name FROM sys_class c LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON c.headmaster_id = u.id WHERE c.id = #{id}
SELECT c.*, u.username AS headmaster_name FROM sys_class c LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON c.headmaster_id = u.id WHERE c.headmaster_id = #{headmasterId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_class (name, headmaster_id, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{name}, #{headmasterId}, NOW(), NOW())
